commands.review_summary:
The PR changes subagent announce retry/backoff and expiry behavior, adds default give-up error text and delivery-failed lifecycle events, updates registry lifecycle tests, and adds root-level proof scripts/docs.

PR surface: Source +58, Tests +298, Docs +643, Other +314. Total +1313 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection shows current main can end give-up paths with fallback reason strings and no delivery-failed event; the linked issue supplies production logs, but I did not run a live multi-agent repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A human/contributor loop is needed because the branch has narrow code defects, a security-sensitive payload decision, and missing real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor's setup.
